CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(ContactId )), Contact.LocationAddressLine2__c & " / " & Contact.LocationStreetNr__c &" / " & Contact.LocationAddressLine3__c & " / " & Contact.LocationPoBox__c & " / " & Contact.LocationZip__c & " " & Contact.LocationCity__c & " / " & TEXT(Contact.LocationCountry__c), Lead.LocationAddressLine2__c & " / " & Lead.LocationStreetNr__c & " / " & Lead.LocationAddressLine3__c & " / " & Lead.LocationPoBox__c & " / " & Lead.LocationZip__c & " " & Lead.LocationCity__c & " / " & TEXT(Lead.LocationCountry__c))
CustomField.label: Postal Address
